title: ANALYSIS OF THE EFFECTIVENESS OF TECHNOLOGY USING VARIOUS POLYMERS
author: Bissembayeva K.T.,
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This paper proposes the use of a polymer solution to increase oil recovery of a layered-heterogeneous reservoir. In the process of applying a polyacrylamide polymer, all characteristics and rheological properties of the polymer are considered.
steps_raw: This paper proposes the use of a polymer solution to increase oil recovery of a layered-heterogeneous reservoir. In the process of applying a polyacrylamide polymer, all characteristics and rheological properties of the polymer are considered.
keywords: polymer, water, reagent, well, grade, coefficient
